summary: Fondations garde-fous data + UX (red team v2.37 Phase 1) · prépare DRGFP v2.38 + consume-existing v2.39 + show-before-ask v2.40 sans ouvrir vecteurs pollution silencieuse. (1) Jargon translation operator-facing · doctrine `operator-vocabulary-translation.md` (18 mappings) + validate-resources HR-20 lint regex 9 patterns + phantom.md mode atlas-overview rendu sans jargon (atlas vivant → historique brand · validations[] → accroches/structures/styles validés · canon/fiches/couches virés). Bug critique v2.36 corrigé. (2) Empty state brand fresh distinct dans phantom.md (audiences=0 AND products=0 AND angles=0 → 4 propositions concrètes au lieu vue 0/0/0/0/0). (3) YAML parser strict build-manifest.py (regex hand-rolled → PyYAML safe_load + flow-sequence shim backward compat) bloque drift frontmatter. (4) Schema `skill-prerequisites.schema.json` créé (Draft-07 strict, 3 levels L1/L2/L3 conditional required) + validate-resources HR-19. (5) Doctrine `confidence-propagation.md` créée · default `min` defensive + 4 modes override + audit trail confidence_chain[] visible. validation-state.json v2.32 → v2.33 additif. (6) canon-tool schema v1.0 → v1.1 · 5 fields requis sur validations[] (brand_slug · attribution_layer enum 10 · validated_at · decay_ttl_days default 90 · _isolation_boundary const brand). learn-from-session HR-Canon-V11 enforcement + HR-Canon-Decay filter promotion. atlas-canon-copy.md doc updated. (7) Doctrine `brand-isolation-discipline.md` créée · default `isolation_scope: brand_only` enforced + 3 enum override. skill-authoring-discipline updated. validate-resources HR-13c. Backward compat strict additif partout · skills v2.36 sans nouveaux fields continuent à valider, warnings non-blocking.
